title: Drive-Time Distortion
summary: During the commute, a subtle air/sky wrongness appears and Ada actively tests mundane explanations.

narrative.newInfo: First anomaly is observed as spatial/depth inconsistency rather than object spectacle.
narrative.dripHook: Self-testing reduces noise but leaves a residue of unresolved pattern suspicion.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Competence reward: Ada investigates instead of panicking.
narrative.notes: Keep ambiguity high and claims low; this is pattern appetite, not revelation.

rewardTokens.description: A subtle anomaly manifests in a familiar frame.
Ada runs quick explanation tests in real time.
